name: test_trav_52_cancel_reservation_with_penalty_voucher
description:
Test Case TRAV-52 : Platita partial - Tichete vacanta

    Summary:
    Verifica incasare pentru facturile platite partial si rezervarea anulata,
    fara bifa "Anuleaza fara penalizare"
descriptionHtml:
Test Case TRAV-52 : Platita partial - Tichete vacanta

Summary:
Verifica incasare pentru facturile platite partial si rezervarea anulata,
fara bifa "Anuleaza fara penalizare"
statusMessage: AssertionError: Data anularii nu este corecta. Expected: 2026-06-17 06:21:32, UI: 2026-06-17 09:21:35
statusTrace:
browser = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="8fadf9e0b766bd65769a29f2a2043a56")>
config = <tests.environment_config.StagingConfig object at 0x7f4f54762350>

    @pytest.mark.staging
    def test_trav_52_cancel_reservation_with_penalty_voucher(browser, config):
        """
        Test Case TRAV-52 : Platita partial - Tichete vacanta
    
        Summary:
        Verifica incasare pentru facturile platite partial si rezervarea anulata,
        fara bifa "Anuleaza fara penalizare"
        """
        search_hotel = SearchHotelPage(browser)
        add_customer = AddCustomer(browser)
        add_tourists = AddTourists(browser)
        handle_reservation = HandleReservation(browser)
        details_reservation = DetailsReservation(browser)
        cancel_reservation_modal = CancelReservationModal(browser)
        search_reservation_page = SearchReservationPage(browser)
        proforma = Proforma(browser)
        payment_modal = PaymentModal(browser)
        invoice_page = InvoicePage(browser)
        generate_date = GenerateData(browser)
    
        main_window = browser.current_window_handle
    
        # =========================================================================
        # STEP 1
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Action:
        #   Adauga o rezervare si plateste PARTIAL rezervarea (Avans 20%) prin Tichete vacanta
        # =========================================================================
        search_hotel.select_resort("Mamaia")
        search_hotel.calendar_months_ahead(3)
        search_hotel.reserve_random_room_allotment("disponibil", 3000)
        add_customer.add_customer(VALID_EMAIL)
    
        add_tourists.configure_and_save_installment_plan(rates_count=2, first_rate_percent=20)
    
        # Procesul de plată
        search_reservation_page.open_proforma_in_new_tab()
        proforma.choose_term_to_pay_in_new_tab("1")
        payment_modal.pay_with_voucher_and_submit()
    
        # Verificare status rate în Proformă
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[1])
        proforma.proforma_loaded()
        browser.refresh()
    
        proforma.check_term_status("1", "Platit")
        proforma.check_term_status("2", "Neplatit")
    
        browser.close()
        browser.switch_to.window(main_window)
        browser.refresh()
    
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Expected Results:
        #   - Rezervarea este adaugata -> Statusul este CF (Confirmata)
        #   - Dupa plata partiala Statusul se schimba in PA (Partial platita)
        # =========================================================================
        search_reservation_page.check_reservation_for_displayed_reservation(ReservationStatues.PA.value)
    
    
        # =========================================================================
        # STEP 2
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Action:
        #   Verifica ca Rezervarea are o incasare
        # =========================================================================
        search_reservation_page.open_invoice_in_new_tab()
    
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Expected Results:
        #   - In Facturi apare factura platita partial
        # =========================================================================
        invoice_page.count_number_of_invoices(1)
    
        browser.close()
        browser.switch_to.window(main_window)
    
    
        # =========================================================================
        # STEP 3
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Action:
        #   Mergi pe Detalii Rezervare si click pe Anuleaza rezervare.
        #   Sterge email hotel, adauga motivul anularii, debifeaza optiunea de
        #   "Anuleaza fara penalizare" si click pe Anuleaza.
        # =========================================================================
        handle_reservation.open_reservation_details_in_new_tab()
        details_reservation.cancel_reservation()
    
        data_and_time_expected = generate_date.get_current_datetime_YYYY_MM_DD_HH_MM_SS()
    
        cancel_reservation_modal.delete_email()
        cancel_reservation_modal.select_cancel_reason(CancelReservationReason.TEST.value)
        cancel_reservation_modal.type_email(VALID_EMAIL)
        cancel_reservation_modal.click_cancel_the_reservation_at_the_hotel()
        cancel_reservation_modal.press_cancel_reservation_button()
    
        browser.switch_to.window(main_window)
        browser.refresh()
    
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Expected Results:
        #   - Statusul rezervarii devine AN (Anulata)
        #   - La detalii rezervare apare Anulata cu info:
        #     Anulata la data: data / ora, Cu motivul: , De catre:
        # =========================================================================
        search_reservation_page.check_reservation_for_displayed_reservation(ReservationStatues.AN.value)
    
        # Redeschidem detaliile ferestrei pentru validarea istoricului textului conform pasului din TestLink
        handle_reservation.open_reservation_details_in_new_tab()
>       details_reservation.verify_cancellation_timestamp(data_and_time_expected)

tests/scripts/trav_52_cancel_reservation_with_penalty_voucher_test.py:130: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

self = <pages.modal_details_reservation.DetailsReservation object at 0x7f4f544c8090>
expected_time_str = '2026-06-17 06:21:32', max_diff_seconds = 10

    def verify_cancellation_timestamp(self, expected_time_str, max_diff_seconds=10):
        """Extrage timpul din UI și verifică dacă se încadrează în delta permisă."""
        reservation_details_text = self.get_reservation_details_text()
        ui_datetime = self.extract_datetime_from_text(reservation_details_text)
        expected_datetime = datetime.strptime(expected_time_str, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    
>       assert abs((ui_datetime - expected_datetime).total_seconds()) <= max_diff_seconds, (
            f"Data anularii nu este corecta. Expected: {expected_datetime}, UI: {ui_datetime}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Data anularii nu este corecta. Expected: 2026-06-17 06:21:32, UI: 2026-06-17 09:21:35
